|desc={{p|Golurk}} is Ridley's only known Pokémon. It was first seen flying with him and was used by him to defend Meloetta from Team Rocket. It was also later used to battle two Team Rocket Grunts' {{p|Golem}} and {{p|Rhydon}}. After that, it battled the {{an|forces of nature}} in their Therian Formes, with [[Cilan's Pansage]] on its back.

Golurk's known moves are {{m|Fly}}, {{m|Flash Cannon}}, {{m|Strength}}, and {{m|Heavy Slam}}.}}
